summary: Iteration 35 - Analytics 500 Error Fix & Hover-to-Expand Metric Widgets. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Analytics/Calibration page loads without 500 errors, Overview page shows three metric widget cards (Division Quality Trend, Standards Compliance, Training Funnel) with working hover-to-expand functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 verified the fix for KeyError: 'total_score' in analytics.py. The fix uses .get() with fallback to handle both 'total_score' and 'overall_score' field names from MongoDB. All analytics endpoints now return 200: /api/analytics/summary (with calibration_heatmap, average_score_by_crew), /api/analytics/random-sample (with samples array), /api/analytics/variance-drilldown (with crew/service_type params). The Overview page's three metric widget cards (Division Quality Trend, Standards Compliance, Training Funnel) have working hover-to-expand functionality using CSS grid-template-columns transition. Hovering one card makes it wider (2.2fr) and shows expanded detail (Score Breakdown, Passing/At Risk/Failing counts, Crews/Members breakdown), pushing the other two cards aside (0.9fr each).

verified_features.backend_analytics_summary: GET /api/analytics/summary returns 200 with calibration_heatmap, average_score_by_crew, period, score_variance_average, fail_reason_frequency, submission_volume_trends, training_approved_count
verified_features.backend_analytics_summary_periods: GET /api/analytics/summary works with daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly period params
verified_features.backend_analytics_random_sample: GET /api/analytics/random-sample returns 200 with pool_size, sample_size, samples array, filter_options
verified_features.backend_analytics_variance_drilldown: GET /api/analytics/variance-drilldown returns 200 with crew, service_type, period, total_reviewed, rows
verified_features.backend_metrics_standards_compliance: GET /api/metrics/standards-compliance returns 200 with standards array (standard, total, passed, compliance_pct)
verified_features.backend_metrics_training_funnel: GET /api/metrics/training-funnel returns 200 with total_people, total_crews, total_members, attempted_training, passed_training, funnel_pct
verified_features.backend_dashboard_overview: GET /api/dashboard/overview returns 200 with totals, queues, workflow_health
verified_features.frontend_overview_metric_widgets_visible: Three metric widget cards visible at bottom of Overview page: Division Quality Trend, Standards Compliance, Training Funnel
verified_features.frontend_hover_division_quality: Hovering Division Quality Trend card shows expanded detail with Score Breakdown (Install: 4.7, Maintenance: 4.3, etc.)
verified_features.frontend_hover_standards_compliance: Hovering Standards Compliance card shows expanded detail with Passing/At Risk/Failing counts
verified_features.frontend_hover_training_funnel: Hovering Training Funnel card shows expanded detail with Crews/Members breakdown (CREWS: 4, MEMBERS: 9)
verified_features.frontend_analytics_page_loads: Analytics/Calibration page loads without 500 errors, shows Average score by crew, Submission volume trends, Fail reason frequency, Random sampling, Calibration heatmap
